description: As part of a network audit project, an engineer reviews the client's existing documentation for accuracy and completeness.

nodes.task_description: Gather all existing network diagrams, IP schemas, and device configurations from the client.

expected_outcome.value: The engineer has all the client's current documentation.

nodes.task_description: Compare the documentation against the actual live configuration of the network by logging into devices.

expected_outcome.value: The engineer identifies multiple discrepancies, such as undocumented firewall rules and incorrect VLAN assignments.

nodes.task_description: Create a report detailing the documentation gaps and inaccuracies as a key finding of the audit.

expected_outcome.value: A formal report is created, recommending a project to update all network documentation.
